{{Infobox technique
| name = Archlord binding
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An [[Archlord]] [[binding]], also referred to as an [[Archlord]] [[Enforcer binding]], is a powerful spiritual technique or property integrated into weapons, constructs, and even biological enhancements. These bindings represent the immense power of an [[Archlord]] and are often difficult for those at lower advancement stages, such as Underlords, to utilize. Attempting to activate an [[Archlord]] [[binding]] without sufficient [[madra]] can cause severe damage to a user's madra channels, and in some cases, the technique may draw power directly from the weapon itself, creating instability. Bindings can manifest in various forms, including [[Enforcer techniques]] that reinforce the user's body or equipment, [[Forger]] bindings that create protective barriers or physical constructs, and specialized combat abilities. Some bindings are inherent to sacred instruments, while others can be artificial or implanted into environments. While some weapons possess bindings that allow them to function even for lower-ranked users, many require the specific power level of an [[Archlord]] to be safely or effectively activated. Additionally, bindings can possess residual wills that may resist manipulation during the process of fusing them together.}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|An [[Archlord binding]] is difficult to activate at an advancement stage without tearing madra channels.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] activated an [[Archlord binding]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Archlord binding]] is a technique that can be activated within a weapon.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's liquid metal [[sword]] contains an [[Archlord binding]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Archlord binding]] draws power from the [[sword]] itself.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Quickriver]] was covered in the [[Archlord]] [[Enforcer binding]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Archlord]] bindings possess residual wills that can fight for control during fusion.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
